scope_assessment.verdict: BORDERLINE STRETCH — mixed role leaning operational, NOT a clean P1 program-management fit (and NOT a clean clerical-primary hard-block either).
scope_assessment.honest_read: Title is 'Program Specialist' but this is contingent-workforce / MSP-VMS program OPERATIONS at a staffing firm (nextSource is a woman-owned MSP/EOR/payrolling firm). Genuine program-coordination duties exist (requisition intake, supplier engagement, hiring-manager relationships, Power BI / VMS / HRIS reporting, SOP & continuous-improvement = Jamie's strong zone), BUT a large share of the recurring duties are operational/admin: background checks, drug screens, I-9 completion, onboarding forms, timekeeping & payroll question support, case resolution via ticketing, system deactivation/badge retrieval. Per profile_compact.md hard-blocker #3 this leans toward ★☆☆ operational territory, though it is not exclusively payroll/benefits/ER-casework. The briefing explicitly flagged this as a ~5yr stretch and directed driving it to submission absent an explicit no-sponsor clause; there is none, so it was driven. Flag to Jamie: the duty mix is heavier on workforce-ops/onboarding-admin than her sweet-spot program-management roles.
scope_assessment.salary_flag: JD + LinkedIn list $60K-$70K/yr. This is BELOW Jamie's standard $70K-$90K forced range from the briefing. Surfacing as a flag — comp is at/under the floor.

blocker: ACCOUNT AUTHENTICATION WALL. The 'Apply on company website' button routes to LiveHire/Humanforce Talent. Apply options offered: LinkedIn OAuth / Google OAuth / Facebook OAuth / 'Your resume' (file upload) / 'Apply with email'. Chose 'Apply with email' (the guest path that avoids OAuth + avoids the sandboxed file_upload). Entered Jamie's real email jamiecheng0103@gmail.com -> the platform responded: 'It looks like you're already registered with Humanforce Talent. Log in to complete your application.' and now requires a PASSWORD to log in. There is NO passwordless / email-magic-link / send-code option on this form (verified via element search). Jamie ALREADY HAS a LiveHire/Humanforce account under this email (LiveHire is a shared candidate platform across many staffing firms — likely created during a prior application). Completing the application requires authenticating into her existing account, which is a login/password (or OAuth) step. Per the operative safety policy, entering a password to authenticate / granting OAuth is a prohibited/explicit-permission action the agent does not perform on the user's behalf — so this is staged for Jamie rather than grinding. NO file-upload or CAPTCHA was even reached; the login gate is upstream of the application form.
human_finish_steps: 1. Open the staged tab (Chrome tab 868509252, LiveHire/Humanforce 'Apply' panel) OR re-open: https://www.livehire.com/careers/nextsource/job/NTR8B/FQFPCL1CXD/program-specialist-cambridge-ma -> click 'I'm interested' -> accept T&Cs -> 'Apply with email' -> email is already entered as jamiecheng0103@gmail.com.

2. Enter Jamie's shared Humanforce/LiveHire password in the Password field and click 'Log in and continue'. (Shared password file: C:\Users\chent\Downloads\job_password.txt. If that password doesn't match this older account, use 'Forgot password?' to reset via Jamie's Gmail.) Alternatively click the LinkedIn OAuth button on the prior step — the browser is logged into LinkedIn as Jamie.
3. Because Jamie's Humanforce profile is already registered, the application form should be largely PRE-FILLED from her stored profile. Review every field for accuracy.

4. If a sponsorship question appears: 'Yes, I will require sponsorship' (TRUTHFUL — never No). Authorized to work in US = Yes. Years of experience = ~3. Salary if forced = $70,000-$90,000 (note JD is $60-70K). Driver's license = Yes.
5. Resume: Jamie's profile likely already has a resume on file in Humanforce; if it asks to attach a fresh one, use jamie/resume.pdf or a tailored Program/Talent resume.
6. Demographics if asked: Woman / Asian / not Hispanic / no disability / non-veteran (or decline). Do NOT list InGenius as a reference.

Confirmed the JD is live and has NO sponsorship/ITAR/clearance hard-stop. Accepted the candidate T&Cs and chose 'Apply with email'. Jamie's real email is already tied to an existing Humanforce Talent account, so the platform demands a password login (no passwordless option exists) BEFORE the application form is reachable. SEPARATE FLAGS for Jamie: (a) scope is a borderline STRETCH — heavier on contingent-workforce ops / onboarding-admin (background checks, I-9, payroll/timekeeping support, ticketing) than her sweet-spot program management; (b) comp $60-70K is below her usual $70-90K floor.
